# openai_certificate (Resource)

Manage an organization certificate.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_certificate" "example" {
  certificate = "example_certificate"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `certificate` (String, Sensitive) certificate

### Optional

- `name` (String) name

### Read-Only

- `certificate_id` (String) certificate id
- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `expires_at` (Number) expires at
- `id` (String) id
- `valid_at` (Number) valid at

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = openai_certificate.example
  id = "certificate_123"
}
```
